  "findings": [
    "Unbonded pool pump motor",
    "Lack of solid copper conductor connection to the motor frame"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an 8 AWG or larger solid copper bonding conductor from the pool's equipotential bonding grid to the external lug on the pump motor",
    "Verify all other pool equipment and metallic components are properly bonded before energizing"
  ],
  "rationale": "An unbonded pool pump motor violates NEC Article 680.26, creating a severe shock and electrocution hazard due to potential differences between the motor frame, the pool water, and surrounding conductive surfaces.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 680.26",
    "NEC Article 680.26(B)(6)"
  ]
}
